case_title: SAMUEL LASSER et al VS. FENTRESS HILL

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, FENTRESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100.00) SERVED JAN-05-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, FENTRESS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY FILED BY LASSER, SAMUEL BENDER, ADAM KAZLAUSKAS, VICTOR HILL, FENTRESS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LASSER, SAMUEL BENDER, ADAM KAZLAUSKAS, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, FENTRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HILL, FENTRESS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MURRAY. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LASSER, SAMUEL BENDER, ADAM KAZLAUSKAS, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL, FENTRESS $1,802.25 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,977.25, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS FOR FAUCET & PAINTING ERRONIOUSLY CHARGED BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF CONCEEDED TO CHARGES OF $1141.95; RENTAL AGREEMENT REQUIRED PLAINTIFF TO PAY ADDITIONAL $81.66 ON K ITEMS. DAMAGE TO CARPET EXCEEDED NORMAL WEAR & TEAR & EVIDENCED LACK OF MAINTENANCE REQUIRED BY CONTRACT. THERE IS NO BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
